Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9872 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Kentilla.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0480 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Kentilla.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0400 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game. It then sets the pointer to the beginning of the BASIC variable area ($2D, $2E) and sets the screen control register #2 ($D016) to allow the game to start correctly.
